name: Apple-Nut Cinnamon Streusel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together eggs, sugar, and sour cream until well blended.
4. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, sunflower kernels, and apples.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture; mix well.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the cake batter.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature. Garnish with additional toppings if desired.
